# Allowlist consumed by .github/workflows/seed-content.yml.
# One path per line, relative to repo root, exact match (grep -Fxq).
# Lines starting with `#` are comments but still count for grep — keep them
# distinct from real script paths.
#
# To allow a new seed script, add its path on its own line. Comments below
# this line are ignored by grep -Fxq because they don't match a script path.
